title: A Mysterious Woman Appears
description: On pages 5–8, a mysterious woman appears as the crew accepts Vivi’s desperate mission, and a mysterious senior agent reminds them how dangerous Baroque Works really is.
scene: A Mysterious Woman Appears. The crew accepts Vivi’s desperate mission, and a mysterious senior agent reminds them how dangerous Baroque Works really is. The scene focuses on the immediate character conflict rather than background exposition.

dialogue.speaker: Vivi
dialogue.text: Aren't you forgetting something?

dialogue.speaker: Vivi
dialogue.text: You know you still owe me, right?

dialogue.speaker: Igaram
dialogue.text: Huh?

dialogue.speaker: Igaram
dialogue.text: No I don't.

dialogue.speaker: Vivi
dialogue.text: Back at Logustown, I lent you 100,000 Bell so you could buy your swords.

dialogue.speaker: Igaram
dialogue.text: Yeah and I paid you back right away! I got my swords for free so I didn't use any of your money.

dialogue.speaker: Vivi
dialogue.text: Yes, but I lent you that money on 300% interest!

dialogue.speaker: Vivi
dialogue.text: I gotta buy some- thing.

dialogue.speaker: Vivi
dialogue.text: Sure, I'll lend you some money. At 300% interest, though.

dialogue.speaker: Vivi
dialogue.text: So you still owe me 200,000 bell!

dialogue.speaker: Igaram
dialogue.text: But you got your money back right away so isn't it fine?

dialogue.speaker: Vivi
dialogue.text: No.

dialogue.speaker: Vivi
dialogue.text: What

dialogue.speaker: Vivi
dialogue.text: Are you saying,

dialogue.speaker: Vivi
dialogue.text: that you can't even keep a single promise?

dialogue.speaker: Vivi
dialogue.text: Now if you do as I say, we'll call it even, okay?

dialogue.speaker: Igaram
dialogue.text: Damn you! You're not going to have a peaceful death, y'hear!

dialogue.speaker: Luffy
dialogue.text: True, I'll probably go to hell when I die.

dialogue.speaker: Vivi
dialogue.text: Curse my used-Essness!

dialogue.speaker: Vivi
dialogue.text: If I were only strong- er...

dialogue.speaker: Vivi
dialogue.text: I could protect the PRINC- Ess...!

dialogue.speaker: Luffy
dialogue.text: Don't worry.

dialogue.speaker: Luffy
dialogue.text: That guy just now is monstrously strong.

dialogue.speaker: Vivi
dialogue.text: If anything were to happen to the Princess...

dialogue.speaker: Vivi
dialogue.text: Then it would be the end of our kingdom...! She must survive no matter what!

dialogue.speaker: Luffy
dialogue.text: I've found her!

dialogue.speaker: Luffy
dialogue.text: Faster, Carue!

dialogue.speaker: Zoro
dialogue.text: There's a docked ship behind cactus rock that we can escape on!

dialogue.speaker: Miss Valentine
dialogue.text: Kyaha Haha!

dialogue.speaker: Mr. 5
dialogue.text: Such a futile struggle.

dialogue.speaker: Zoro
dialogue.text: Ms. Monday!

dialogue.speaker: Igaram
dialogue.text: Go on!

dialogue.speaker: Miss Valentine
dialogue.text: Get past here and you should be able to escape on the boat.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: As for these guys, I'll do my best to stop them.

dialogue.speaker: Luffy
dialogue.text: But...

summary: This part advances the chapter by focusing on a mysterious woman appears. It keeps the main tension clear while preserving the dialogue that drives the scene.
